Title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
Actors: Jakari Fraser, Nicolas Roye, Benjamin Valic
Plot: Follow Peter Parker, Gwen Stacy and Miles Morales and their adventures as the young heroes team up with Hulk, Ms. Marvel and Black Panther to defeat foes like Rhino, Doc Ock and Green Goblin and learn that teamwork is the best way to save the day.
